instructors.name: mohamed arafa
instructors.title: Mr.
instructors.bio:
Mr. Mohamed Arafa is an experienced German language educator and academic leader with more than 15 years of expertise in teaching German and preparing students for academic success. Throughout his career, he has led German language departments, mentored teachers, and designed curricula aligned with international educational standards.

With advanced training from the Goethe-Institut and extensive experience supporting students at different proficiency levels, Mr. Arafa helps future international students build the language skills and confidence they need to study in Germany. His expertise covers German language learning, exam preparation, academic guidance, and educational quality assurance.
